vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: Even though rooms with ocean views can cost an arm and a leg, I think the experience is worth every penny.

vocab.meaning: thưởng ngoạn, say sưa ngắm nhìn thứ gì đó đẹp đẽ
vocab.example: There is nothing like waking up and feasting your eyes on a breathtaking mountain panorama right from your balcony.

vocab.meaning: chi quá nhiều tiền, làm khánh kiệt tài chính
vocab.example: I always look for a nice view, provided that it doesn't break the bank and fit within my travel budget.

vocab.meaning: đáng từng đồng bát gạo (đáng đồng tiền bát gạo)
vocab.example: The hotel was pricey, but the stunning view of the Eiffel Tower made it worth every penny.

vocab.meaning: một cảnh tượng đáng để chiêm ngưỡng
vocab.example: The sunset over the bay, viewed from my hotel window, was truly a sight to behold.

vocab.meaning: hồi phục năng lượng, nghỉ ngơi
vocab.example: Staring at a serene landscape helps me recharge my batteries and escape the stress of daily life.

vocab.meaning: hoàn toàn khác biệt (theo hướng tốt hơn)
vocab.example: Staying in a room with a natural view is worlds apart from staying in a dark, cramped room facing a concrete wall.

vocab.meaning: niềm vui nhân đôi, điều may mắn thêm vào
vocab.example: The hotel service was excellent, and the panoramic view of the city was just the icing on the cake.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng cuộc sống xa hoa, vui vẻ
vocab.example: When I go on an annual vacation, I like to live it up a little by booking a suite with the best view available.

vocab.meaning: là điểm nhấn quan trọng nhất, thu hút mọi sự chú ý
vocab.example: The hotel interior was nice, but it was definitely the view of the valley that stole the show.
